name: Iso11783OPSaveAuxAssignment
title: Iso11783OPSaveAuxAssignment
syntax: long Iso11783OPSaveAuxAssignment( dword ecuHandle, char filename[] );
description: The function saves the current auxiliary input assignment as "Preferred Auxiliary Input Assignment" in an ini file.
With the function Iso11783OPLoadAuxAssignment the "Preferred Assignment" can be load and used again.
